expectations.text: Identifies the entry stage as requirements rather than PRD, technical design, tasks, or implementation.
expectations.evidence: Baseline output was produced without the chain skill; it often handled missing files safely but lacked chain status and explicit gate discipline.

expectations.text: Routes first to requirement-exploration because the requirement is incomplete.

expectations.text: Creates or plans to maintain delivery-chain-status.md because the chain skill was invoked.

expectations.text: Does not generate technical design, tasks, audit standards, or implementation before the PRD is ready.

expectations.text: Asks one focused blocking question if the requirement is too vague to proceed.

timing.note: Timing metrics were not included in subagent completion notifications.

uncertainties: Several eval prompts referenced missing fixture paths, reducing discrimination between with-skill and baseline runs.
